titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 40: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 40. (A.R. No. 230 of 1903.) TOṆḌAIMĀNĀḌ, CHITTOOR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a base of the central shrine in the Kōdaṇḍaramēśvara temple.

Records that the sabhā and the nagarattār of Toṇḍaimāṉpērāṟṟūr in Āṟṟūr-nāḍu in Tiruvēṅkaṭa-kōṭṭam received one hundred and five kaḻañju of gold duly tested for purity as also four thousand kāḍi of paddy (by the measure Vāgīśvara-paṇḍittaṉ) from the pontiff paḷḷippaḍai Vāgīśvara-paṇḍita bhaṭārar for conducting seven day festival commencing on the day of asterism of kēṭṭai and ending with sadaiyam in the puraṭṭādi month at the temple Śrī Kōdaṇḍarāmēśvaram alias Ādityēśvaragrihm as well as for providing food offerings on that occasion. The sabhaiyār and the nagarattār were to apportion the interest of one thousand kāḍi of pady accrued annually out of the endowed four-thousand kāḍi for feeding the mendicants, brāhmaṇas and devotees on those seven days at the temple of various faiths. Reference is also made to the festival, Indra-viḻa. The manner in which these benefaction were intended to be carried out is laid out in detail. It was also enjoined on the mahāvṛattins of the temple Ādityēśvaram, the pṛithiviṭaṅkakgaṇapperumakkaḷ of Tiruppaṉṟīśvaram at Kāvirippākkam and panmāhēśvarak-kaṇkāṇi were to oversee the prompt supply of paddy and proper execution of the charity by the two bodies, the sabhaiyār and the nagarattār. It is interesting to note that if these two bodies defaulted in the carrying out of these benefactions as detailed above, they could be tortured and coerced by the above three bodies and got them to carry out the benefaction for which they had given an undertaking.
Published in S.I.I. Vol. VIII. No. 529.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . maturaikoṇṭakopparakecariparmmakku yāṇṭu muppattuṉālāvatu tiruveṅkaṭakkoṭṭattu Āṟṟūrṉāṭṭu toṇṭaimāṉperāṟṟūr sabhaiyomum nakarattomum paḷḷipaṭai vāgīśvarapaṇḍitabhaṭārar śrīkotaṇṭarāmiśvaramākiya Ādityeśvarakarattu Āḷvārkkup puraṭṭātit tiṅkaḷ tirukkeṭṭaimutal Eti reḻu nāḷun tirunakṣattirammākiya tiruccataiyattuṉṟun tiruutsavañ ceyvataṟkum bhojaṉattukkum paḷḷipaṭai vāgīśvarapaṇḍitabhaṭārar toṇṭaimāṉ perāṟṟūr sabhaiyomum nakarattomum vaḻi cantrādityavaṟ Idharmmañ ceyvatāka Eṅkaḷvaḻi vaitta poṉ cuṭṭu veṭṭic cūṭukkaṭuttu tippokki Ūrkkaṟcemmai mutal nūṟṟaiṅ kaḻañcum vāgīśarapaṇḍitaṉeṉṉum pūṇṭūmpiṉāl niṟaittaḷavu tūnel nālāyirak kāṭiyum Iṉnel nālāyirak kāṭikkum Āṇṭuvarai Aiṅkāṟ palicaiyāl vanta nel Āyirakkāṭi yinnel Āyirakkāṭikkun tiruviḻāveṭukkum Eḻu nāḷum nicatippaṭi śrīmahāvratikaḷuḷḷiṭṭa Āṟusamayattuttapasvikaḷum Āka Irunūṟṟuvarum brāhmaṇar munnūṟṟuvarumāka Aññūṟṟuvarum bhaktarāyiṉa palacamaiya Aññūṟṟuvarumāka Āyiravarkkum patteṭṭukkuttal meyyā larici nāṭuriyāka nicata marici muppatteḻu kāṭi Aintūmpāka Eḻunāḷum Ūṭṭic celavupeṟu marici Iru nūṟṟaṟupattiru kāṭi Aintūmpiṉāl Aintiraṇṭu vaṇṇa nellākki Aṟu nūṟṟaimpattaṟu kāṭi Irutūm piru nāḻiyum tiruviḻāppo
tun te[ varkkut] tiruvamirtarici nicati ḻiyāka Eḻunāḷaikku nel Iru kāṭi Aṟutūmpu nāḻiyun tirttattu nāḷāl tirukkāḷatti Āḷvārkkup peruntiruvamirtukkuk kaṟikkun tayirkkum neykkum Uḷḷiṭṭu nāṟkāṭi Oru tūmpiru nāḻiyum cālaikkuk kaṟikku nicati Iru kāṭiyāka neṟ patiṉaṟu kāṭiyum morkku nel nicati patinaiṅ kāṭiyāka Eḻupatteḻu kaāṭiyum Uppukku nicati nellu Oru kāṭiyāka Eḻukāṭiyum puḷippaḻavaṭai 7-kku nellu Eḻukāṭiyum Ilai Iṭuvāṉukku nellu Eḻukāṭiyum nīraṭṭuvāṉukku nellup patiṉkāṭiyum kalamiṭuṅ kucavaṉukku nel muppatiṉ kāṭiyum cālaikkuk kaṟikkuk koḷḷu nicati Iru kāṭikku nel mukkāṭiyāka Eḻu nāḷaikkum nellu Irupattorukāṭiyum pūviṭu mālaikāraṉukku Eḻu kāṭiyum viṟakiṭuvāṉukku nellu Eḻukāṭiyum Ippaṭi panmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇiyoṭu niṉṟivvaḻivu kaṇakkaṟuttu kkuṭu[ kku*] kaṭava Ivvūr madhyastaṉukku nellu Irupatiṉkāṭiyum cālaikkaḷanta variciyiley Ivaṉukku nicata marici nāṉāḻiyum tiruccuṇṇattukku mañcaḷukku nellu Irukāṭi Oṉpatiṉ ṟūmpu muṉṉāḻiyum Āka nel Eṇṇūṟṟeḻupattu muk kāṭi nīkki niṉṟa nel nūṟ ṟirupatteḻu kāṭiyālp poṉ mukkaḻañce muṉṟumañcāṭiyuṅ kuṉṟiyum poṉ ṉūṟṟaiṅ kaḻañciṉālum Āṇṭuvarai palicaiyāl vanta poṉ patiṉmuk kaḻañce Araikkālum Ākap poṉ patiṉaṟukaḻañce Āṟumañcāṭiyil nicatippaṭi Uṇṇum Āyiravarkkum Eḻu nāḷaikku Uṇṇa ṇkāṭi Iru tūmpu Āḻākku Intiraviḻāviṉukkumāka viḷak[ kiṉukkun] Ey melppaṭi nāḷaikku nāṟkkāṭi Eḻutūmpu muṉṉāḻi muḻākakku Āḻākkumāka ney patiṉmukkāṭikku ṟu kaḻa ṭu māṇikaḷ patiṉma ḻañce kālum palakāyattukku Araik kaḻañcum veṟuṅkāy patiṉāyirattukku kaḻañcum veṟuvi
laip paṟṟu muṉṉūṟṟukku kaḻañcaraiyuñ cuṇ ru kaḻañcum Araṅkaḻivu coṉṟuṭaṉuṉṟicakkun taccaṉukku parṣaiyār kūttāṭiṉārkkum pāṭiṉārkkumāka pū(j)aiṉaikku mukkaḻañ ṉ patiṉaṟu kaḻa ṉakavu mippoṉṉu vat celuttuvomākavu mivvaḻi vipparicu vaḻuvāmey Ivvādityeśvarakat tirukkum śrī mahāvratikaḷum kāvirippākkattut tiruppaṉṟīśvarattup pirativiṭaṅkak kaṇapperumakkaḷum panmāheśvarak kaṇkāṇiyum Immuṉṟu tiṟattārum niṉṟu Eṅkaḷait tāṅkaḷ veṇṭina kocceytu Idharmmam celuttuvikkappeṟuvarākavum mippati Idharmmañcandrādityavat vaittamaiyi lippaṭi vaḻuviṉa nāṉṟu Aṉṟāḷkoviṉukku nūṟṟu kkaḻañcu poṉ taṇṭamumpaṭṭu Itdhanmamippaṭi vaḻuvāme celuttuvomākavu mittiruviḻāc cuṭṭip paṇiceymakkaḷukkuc coṟṟāl vanta Aḻivellā mivveḻāyiravarilumey celavu peṟuvatākavu mipparicoṭṭic celuttuvomākap paḷḷippaṭaiyuṭaiya vāgīśvarapaṇṭitabhaṭārarkku Oṭṭukkuṭuttom toṇṭaimāṉperāṟṟūr sabhaiyomum nakarattomum Idharmmattukku Ahitam niṉaittār gaṅgaiyiṭai kumariiṭai Eḻunūṟṟuk kātattiluñ ceytār ceyta pāvattuppaṭuvār Idharmmattai vaḻuvāme(c) celutti rakṣittār Aśvamedham ceyta palam peṟuvār .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 40 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
